title: dolichos trilobus
intro: Dolichos trilobus, also known as the three-leaf bean or Chinese bean trefoil, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Dolichos trilobus typically involve drying and grinding the roots or leaves into a powder, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a supplement.
